# Bug Fix PR: [Issue Name]

## Description
<!-- Describe the bug and fix -->

## Bug Impact
- [ ] Competition critical
- [ ] Affects robot performance
- [ ] Affects driver experience
- [ ] Documentation/dashboard only

## Fix Verification
- [ ] Original bug can be reproduced
- [ ] Fix resolves the issue
- [ ] No new issues introduced
- [ ] Tested on competition bot

## Logging
- [ ] AdvantageKit logging maintained/fixed if affected

## Leadership Verification
- [ ] Team leadership has tested/verified functionality

## Pre-merge Checklist
- [ ] Code reviewed by leader
- [ ] No merge conflicts with production
- [ ] Branch up to date with production

## Documentation
- [ ] Full Javadoc comments on all changed classes and variables
- [ ] Complete mkdocs documentation updated
- [ ] Update documentation if needed
- [ ] Notify affected team members
